title: EQ - Custom EQ - White circle when changing value on sliders
scenario: Custom EQ slider dot white circle visual indicator appears and follows user movement when adjusting any of the 7 sliders in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
Ensure an EQ-capable Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
Tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
Choose 'Custom EQ' from the available EQ presets.
Press and hold the slider dot on any of the 7 frequency sliders.
While holding, slide the dot to change the value.
expected: When holding and sliding any of the 7 sliders, a white circle should appear around the slider dot and follow the user's movement. The white circle should disappear when the dot is released. This behavior should work consistently for all 7 sliders.
